items.title: Raksha Mantri exhorts Indian diaspora in Germany to continue contributing to stronger bilateral ties while staying rooted in their own heritage

items.title: Shri Bhupender Yadav announces Shekha Jheel Bird Sanctuary as India’s 99th Ramsar site; Uttar Pradesh’s tally rises to 12

items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays heartfelt tribute to the victims of Pahalgam terror attack
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays heartfelt tribute to the victims of Pahalgam terror attack The grief and pain of losing our people still remain in the heart of every Indian Terrorism is the greatest enemy of humanity, against which we must stand united to fight and defeat India will continue its zero-tolerance p…
